description:
Speak, don't type

Speak naturally, and Typeless will turn your words into polished messages, emails, and documents that read like you carefully typed them - in real time. 4x faster than typing.
Custom shortcuts for external keyboards

Typeless now supports additional shortcuts for Dictate, Translate, and Ask anything to ensure a seamless speaking experience when using external keyboards.
- Add additional shortcuts: Go to Settings and click "Add another" under Keyboard shortcuts to type a new shortcut. Repeat to add multiple shortcuts for Dictate, Translate, and Ask anything.
Thanks for using Typeless and enjoy a setup that truly works for you.
